personal.name: Harsh Kumar
personal.about: I am a backend developer. Proficient in Rust, Python and Shell scripting. I also have a knowledge of C/C++. I have a keen interest in understanding the inner workings of technologies, regardless of their nature. I'm skilled in PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, Docker, DuckDB, Redis and many more.

highlights: Benchmarked and integrated TimescaleDB to optimize time-series tables in PostgreSQL, improving query performance.
Contributed in automation of tenant onboarding process based on k8s, keycloak etc using python.
Implemented OpenTelemetry metrics for Python FastAPI servers and Temporal workers, using VictoriaMetrics as collector and Grafana for dashboard visualization.
Added OpenTelemetry-based distributed tracing to backend services, linking traceIDs and spanIDs for end-to-end monitoring and root cause analysis.
POC and implement envoy based external authentication gRPC server written in rust plugged to istio-envoy in k8s.
POC and deliver use of gRPC request over HTTP with envoy.
Developed scalable backend servers in Rust using crates like tokio, axum (web framework), actix (actor model), arrow-rs, and more.
Implemented core features including advanced search, document export, document upload, and large-scale parquet data processing.
Automated operational tasks by writing custom shell scripts.
Worked extensively with PostgreSQL, Redis, and DuckDB for high-performance data storage and retrieval.
Built sample backend servers replicating basic banking functionality using Rust and Python (FastAPI).

openSource.description: Rust bindings for OBS Studio's libobs C API

contributions.title: Fixed an issue where monitor capture consistently resulted in a black screen
Implemented new functionalities to support advanced OBS Studio capabilities within Rust applications
Additional OBS Studio capability support in Rust
